background: The probability of failure of a medical device when it is tested is equal to 0.05. Assume independence of tests.

task.query: What is the probability that failure occurs in less than 15 tests?
task.answer: The required probability that failure occurs in less than 15 tests is $$\begin{aligned} P(N \leq 14) & =1-(1-p)^{14} \\ & =1-(0.95)^{14} \\ & =0.5123 \end{aligned}$$
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

task.query: What is the memoryless property of the geometric distribution?
task.answer: It should be noted that the geometric distribution is the only discrete distribution having the memoryless property. In other words, mathematically, it is $$P(N \geq(n+s) \mid N>s)=P(N \geq n) \quad n=1,2, \ldots$$ This memoryless property can be shown as follows. We know that $$P(N>n)=P(N \geq n+1)=(1-p)^n$$ Thus, $$\begin{aligned} P(N \geq(n+s) \mid N>s) & =\frac{P(N \geq n+s)}{P(N>s)} \\ & =\frac{(1-p)^{n+s-1}}{(1-p)^s} \\ & =(1-p)^{n-1} \\ & =P(N \geq n) \end{aligned}$$
task.method: 事件发生概率及独立性

meta_info.chapter: Chapter 2: Distribution Functions and Its Applications
